description: Represents a single event in the Dynatrace environment. Events can be ingested via the API or detected automatically by Dynatrace.

eventId.description: The unique identifier of the event.

title.description: The display title of the event.

startTime.description: The start time of the event as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

endTime.description: The end time of the event as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds. Null for open events.

entityId.description: A lightweight reference to a monitored entity.
The unique identifier of the entity, e.g., SERVICE-1234567890ABCDEF.

name.description: The display name of the entity.

type.description: The type of the entity, e.g., SERVICE, HOST, PROCESS_GROUP, APPLICATION.

properties.description: Additional key-value metadata attached to the event.

status.description: The current status of the event. OPEN indicates the event is still active; CLOSED indicates it has ended.

title: Event
